Big fig tree. Hangs over fence in a sidewalk-adjacent grass area. Lots of figs. Bring a small ladder. Access: Private but overhanging.

Truly impressive little urban pawpaw patch. I have not seen fruit here, I think it's because these trees are probably all part of one colonial organism. Maybe one day someone will introduce another tree down here for some genetic diversity and get some fruit.
